rubrics:
Вечірня: катизми нема. На «Господи, взиваю» 6 стихир: 3 Октоїха, 3 прп., Сл., І нині: богород. Прокімен дня. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар прп., Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря прп. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. прп.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар прп. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. відпустовий за гласом тропаря прп. Катизми черг., сідальні Октоїха. Пс. 50. Канон Октоїха і прп. На 9-ій пісні – «Чеснішу від херувимів». По 9-ій – світильний Октоїха, Сл.: світильний прп., І нині: його богород. Стиховня Октоїха. По «Отче наш»: тропар прп., Сл., І нині: богород. за гласом тропаря прп. і за днем тижня. Відпуст середній з помин. прп.
Часи: на 1-му – дня; на 6-му – храму; на 3-му та 9-му – прп.
Літургія: вся Служба – дня. Ап. – 1 Кор. 134 зач.; 5, 9 – 6, 11. Єв. – Мт. 56 зач.; 13, 54-58.

troparion_en.text: From your youth you followed the angelic life / and were therefore filled with many godly gifts. / O Sisoes, emulator of the angels, / in the hour of your going forth from this life, / you shone resplendently as the sun / revealing your glory and illuminating our souls!

kontakion_en.text: In asceticism you were revealed to be an earthly angel, / continually enlightening the thoughts of the faithful with divine signs. / Therefore we honor you with faith, venerable Sisoes.

troparion.text: From your youth you followed the angelic life / and were therefore filled with many godly gifts. / O Sisoes, emulator of the angels, / in the hour of your going forth from this life, / you shone resplendently as the sun / revealing your glory and illuminating our souls!

kontakion.text: In asceticism you were revealed to be an earthly angel, / continually enlightening the thoughts of the faithful with divine signs. / Therefore we honor you with faith, venerable Sisoes.

oca_saints.name: Venerable Sisoes the Schemamonk of the Kiev Far Caves

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Sisoes, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Uncovering of the relics of Holy Princess Juliana Olshanskaya

kontakion.text: We know you as a living temple of God, magnificently adorned with virginal purity,   / O Holy and Righteous Virgin Princess Juliana;   / therefore, lovingly honoring your holy relics, we entreat you, the constant intercessor for our desires:   /  “Bring your prayers for us to the Lord,   / and free us from all our troubles, by your intercession at the Throne of the Most High,   / so we may cry out to you: ‘Rejoice, Holy Virgin Juliana, the beautiful bride of Christ.’”

oca_saints.name: Martyr Marinus, his wife Martha, their children, and those with them at Rome

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Martyr Isaurius the Deacon of Apollonia in Macedonia and those with him

troparion.text: Your holy martyr Isaurius, and those with him, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Confessor and Wonderworker Quintus of Phrygia

troparion.text: In you, O Father, was preserved with exactness what was according to the image;  / for you took up the Cross and followed Christ.  /  By so doing, you taught us to disregard the flesh, for it passes away; /  but to care for the soul, since it is immortal.  /  Therefore, O Holy Confessor Quintus, your spirit rejoices with the Angels.

kontakion.text: Finding delight in abstinence, /  you subdued the desires of the flesh. /  Revealed as one nurtured in the Faith,  / you blossomed like the Tree of Life in Paradise,  / O Holy Father Quintus.

oca_saints.name: Martyr Lucy, and those with her, at Rome

troparion.text: Your holy martyr Lucy and her companions, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls
